hooks.command: PAYLOAD=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$PAYLOAD" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.csv'; then CONTENT=$(echo "$PAYLOAD" | jq -r '.tool_input.content'); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '([^="]|^)[0-9]{16,}'; then echo 'ERROR: Detected raw integers >15 digits. Excel will truncate these. Rewrite using ="1234..." format.' && exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file_path; if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.py'; then black "$file_path"; fi; }
INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active'); if [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; pytest tests/ || (echo 'Tests failed! Please fix breaking changes.'; exit 1)
